_provenance: Curated scalars from the project log (project_poyo_reproduction_status.md). Each came from a named train.py / bayes_report.py / wwj alpha_report.py run on the named checkpoint in neural-decoding-transfer/ckpts. The per-condition decode CURVES are NOT here -- they are read by generate.py from ../dataeff/*.jsonl and ../dataeff/xsub_all.jsonl, the raw pod pulls. Nothing in the manuscript is hand-transcribed; this file is the only hand-curated data and every number in it is traceable to a logged run.

rodent._note: Cross-species spatial transfer (Vollan/Moser 2025 rat MEC/hippocampus), monkey-motor base -> 2D allocentric position via a NEW position_2d head. Per-session test R2 is read by generate.py from ../dataeff/vollan_results.jsonl (raw pod pull, run 2026-06-27, pod msywkmbi0qlpv5). The train-window counts below are the only hand-curated rodent scalars: from the same run's log (window_length=1.0s, floored per train interval), they explain the data-scarcity axis.
